mapper.select:
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_1#Sql001 */ Q.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AS brandCode, Q.BB_PRODUCT_NAME AS brandName, Q.BB_PRODUCT_NAME || '(' || Q.BB_PRODUCT_CODE || ')' AS brand, Q.BB_STOCK AS unit, CASE WHEN Q.BB_UNIT_KBN = '1' THEN DECODE(Q.BB_STOCK,null,null,TO_CHAR(Q.BB_STOCK,'FM9,999,999,999')||'株') WHEN Q.BB_UNIT_KBN = '2' THEN DECODE(Q.BB_STOCK,null,null,TO_CHAR(Q.BB_STOCK,'FM9,999,999,999')||'円') WHEN Q.BB_UNIT_KBN = '3' THEN DECODE(Q.BB_STOCK,null,null,TO_CHAR(Q.BB_STOCK,'FM9,999,999,999')||'口') END AS applyUnit, Q.BB_LOT_DATE AS bbLotDate, DECODE(Q.BB_LOT_DATE,null,null,TO_CHAR(Q.BB_LOT_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI')||'~') AS lotDate, Q.BB_GESTURE_VALUE AS issuePriceType, Q.BB_PRICE_FROM AS startPriceDisplay, Q.BB_PRICE_TO AS finishPriceDisplay, Q.BB_PRICE_CUT AS priceDisplayTick, Q.BB_DISCOUNT_FROM AS startDiscountRate, Q.BB_DISCOUNT_TO AS finishDiscountRate, Q.BB_DISCOUNT_CUT AS discountRateTick, Q.BB_STRIKE_PRICE AS marketOrderStrikePrice, Q.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM AS bookBuildingApplyPeriodFrom, Q.BB_PRESENTATION_TO AS bookBuildingPresentationTo, TO_CHAR(Q.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD') AS bookBuildingPresentationFrom, TO_CHAR(R.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') || '~' || TO_CHAR(R.BB_PRESENTATION_TO,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS bookBuildingApplyPeriod, Q.BB_SETTLE_DATE AS deliveryDate, Q.BB_URGENT_STOP AS urgentStop, DECODE(Q.BB_UNIT_KBN,'1','株','2','円','3','口','株') AS sellBuyUnitType, Q.BB_IPO_PO_KBN AS ipoPoKbn, CASE WHEN Q.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '0' AND Q.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '1' THEN TO_CHAR(Q.BB_PRICE_FROM,'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' || '~' || TO_CHAR(Q.BB_PRICE_TO,'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' WHEN Q.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '0' AND Q.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '2' THEN 'ディスカウント率・' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(Q.BB_DISCOUNT_FROM,'FM990.9999'),'.') || '%' || '~' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(Q.BB_DISCOUNT_TO,'FM990.999'),'.') || '%' WHEN Q.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '1' AND Q.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '1' THEN 'ストライクプライス・' || TO_CHAR(Q.BB_PRICE_FROM,'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' || '~' || TO_CHAR(Q.BB_PRICE_TO,'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' WHEN Q.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '1' AND Q.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '2' THEN 'ディスカウント率・ストライクプライス・' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(Q.BB_DISCOUNT_FROM,'FM990.9999'),'.') || '%' || '~' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(Q.BB_DISCOUNT_TO,'FM990.999'),'.') || '%' END AS assumeCondition, R.EDELIV_ONLY_FLAG AS edelivOnlyFlag, R.CHANGE_BB_PERIOD_MSG AS periodUpdateMessage, R.CHANGE_PRICE_MSG priceUpdateMessage FROM ETINTRA.BB_PRODUCT_MASTER Q LEFT JOIN CORDYS.M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD R ON Q.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = R.PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_CHAR(Q.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD') = R.PRESENTATION_FROM WHERE IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('yyyyMMddhh24mi') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(R.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'yyyyMMddhh24mi') AND TO_CHAR(R.BB_PRESENTATION_TO, 'yyyyMMddhh24mi')
AND Q.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_1#Sql002 */ B.BB_SEQ AS investorAttributeValue, B.BB_INVESTOR_ATT_NAME AS investorAttributeName FROM ETINTRA.BB_INVESTOR_ATT B WHERE B.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}) ORDER BY B.BB_SEQ ASC

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_1#Sql003 */ A.BUTEN_CODE AS butenCode, A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AS accountNumber, TRIM(A.UAI_QA_INVESTMENT_PLAN) AS investmentPolicyType, TRIM(A.UAI_OCCUPATION) AS professionType, TO_NUMBER(NVL(A.UAI_EXP_STOCK, 0)) || '年' AS stockSpotInvestExperienceYears, A.UAI_OFFICE_NAME AS officeName, A.UAI_QA_FINANCIAL_ASSETS AS financialAssetsType, A.CORPORATION_KBN AS corporationType, A.UAI_FAMILY_NAME_KANJI AS customerLastNameKanji, A.UAI_NAME_KANJI AS customerFirstNameKanji, A.UAI_FAMILY_NAME_KANA AS customerLastNameKana, A.UAI_NAME_KANA AS customerFirstNameKana, A.CUSTOMER_ID AS customerCode, A.DEALER_NUMBER AS dealerNumber, A.NAME_KANJI AS customerNameKanji, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.OPEN_ACCT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS openAcctDate, A.TC_COMP_RANK AS complianceRank, C.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN AS electronicDocConsentType, DECODE(C.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN, 1, TO_CHAR(C.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') , '') AS consentDate FROM CORDYS.MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO A LEFT JOIN CORDYS.T_IPO_PO_EDELIV_AGRMNT C ON A.BUTEN_CODE = C.BUTEN_CODE AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER WHERE A.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND A.UAI_ACCT_DEL_FLG = '0'

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_1#Sql004 */ NVL(I.MAX_SAIRYOU_ALLO, 10) - NVL(I.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, 0) - NVL(J.beforeTransferDiscretionAlloCount, 0) AS ableTimes, NVL(I.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, 0) AS discretionAlloCount, NVL(I.MAX_SAIRYOU_ALLO, 10) AS discretionAlloUpperLimit, NVL(J.beforeTransferDiscretionAlloCount, 0) AS beforeTransferDiscretionAlloCount, J.OLD_BRANCH_NO AS oldButen, J.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO AS oldAccountNumber FROM CORDYS.MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO H LEFT JOIN ETINTRA.IPO_COUNT_MASTER I ON H.BUTEN_CODE = SUBSTR(I.BRANCH_NO, 1, 3) AND H.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(I.ACCOUNT_NO) AND TO_CHAR(I.ANNUAL,'YYYY') = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYY') - CASE WHEN IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('MM') < '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END LEFT JOIN ( SELECT F.BUTEN_CODE, F.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, F.OLD_BRANCH_NO, F.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO, NVL(G.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, 0) AS beforeTransferDiscretionAlloCount FROM ( SELECT D.BUTEN_CODE, D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, E.OLD_BRANCH_NO, E.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO FROM CORDYS.MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO D INNER JOIN CALLCENTER.CHANGE_ACCOUNT E ON D.BUTEN_CODE = SUBSTR(E.NEW_BRANCH_NO, 1, 3) AND D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(E.NEW_ACCOUNT_NO) WHERE D.BUTEN_CODE= #{req.butenCode} AND D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) ) F LEFT JOIN ETINTRA.IPO_COUNT_MASTER G ON F.OLD_BRANCH_NO = G.BRANCH_NO AND TO_NUMBER(F.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO) = TO_NUMBER(G.ACCOUNT_NO) AND TO_CHAR(G.ANNUAL,'YYYY') = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYY') - CASE WHEN IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('MM') < '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) J ON H.BUTEN_CODE = J.BUTEN_CODE AND H.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = J.ACCOUNT_NUMBER WHERE H.BUTEN_CODE= #{req.butenCode} AND H.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_1#Sql005 */ COUNT(*) AS count FROM ETINTRA.BB_PRODUCT_MASTER K INNER JOIN ETINTRA.SR_ACCEPT L ON K.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = L.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_CHAR(K.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(L.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM) AND L.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(L.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) WHERE K.BB_LOT = '0' AND K.BB_IPO_PO_KBN = '1'

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_1#Sql006 */ COUNT(*) AS count FROM ETINTRA.BB_PRODUCT_MASTER M INNER JOIN ETINTRA.SR_ACCEPT N ON M.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = N.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_CHAR(M.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(N.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM) AND N.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{req.oldButen}, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(N.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.oldAccountNumber}) WHERE M.BB_LOT = '0' AND M.BB_IPO_PO_KBN = '1'

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_1#Sql007 */ TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SUM(NVL(P.depositAssetAmount, 0)), -4) / 10000, 'FM9,999,999,999,999,999') || '万円' AS depositAssetAmount FROM ( SELECT SUM(NVL(O.CURRENCT_PRICE,0)) AS depositAssetAmount FROM CORDYS.T_BALANCE_PREV O WHERE O.DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM CORDYS.T_BALANCE_PREV) AND O.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND O.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND O.PRODUT_CD IN ('01','51','52','25','12','04','13','15','16','14','99','100','50','98','97','33') GROUP BY O.BUTEN_CODE,O.ACCOUNT_NUMBER UNION ALL SELECT TRUNC(SUM(NVL(O.CURRENCT_PRICE, 0)), 0) AS depositAssetAmount FROM CORDYS.T_BALANCE_PREV O WHERE O.DATE_YMD = (SELECT MAX(DATE_YMD) FROM CORDYS.T_BALANCE_PREV) AND O.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND O.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND O.PRODUT_CD = '06' GROUP BY O.BRAND_CODE,O.DEPOSIT_TYPE,O.PRODUT_CD ) P

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_1#Sql008 */ TO_CHAR(X.READ_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS readTime FROM CORDYS.T_IPO_PO_DOCUMENT_READ X WHERE X.PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND X.PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}) AND X.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND X.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND X.DOCUMENT_ID = '00000' AND X.VERSION_NUMBER = '000000'
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_1#Sql009 */ COUNT(*) AS count FROM ETINTRA.BB_PRODUCT_MASTER S WHERE S.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_1#Sql010 */ COUNT(*) AS count FROM ETINTRA.BB_ACCEPT T WHERE T.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND T.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}) AND T.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(T.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_1#Sql012 */ COUNT(*) AS count FROM ETINTRA.SR_ACCEPT K WHERE K.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND K.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}) AND K.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(K.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_1#Sql013 */ L.BB_STOCK *NVL(M.MAX_ALLOCATION_UNITS,10) AS upperLimit FROM ETINTRA.BB_PRODUCT_MASTER L LEFT JOIN ETINTRA.BB_MAX_ALLOCATION_QUANTITY M ON L.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = M.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(L.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD') ) = M.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM WHERE L.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND TO_CHAR(L.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD') = #{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_1#Sql014 */ A.BB_BRANCH_CODE AS butenCode, A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER AS accountNumber, A.BB_QUANTITY AS quantity, NVL(TO_CHAR(A.BB_UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_CHAR(A.BB_CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS')) AS bbCreateDate, A.BB_STRIKE_PRICE AS marketOrder, NVL(A.BB_PRICE, A.BB_DISCOUNT) AS priceDiscountRate, A.BB_SEQ AS investorAttributeValue, A.BB_INVESTOR_ATT_NAME AS investorAttributeName, A.BB_REMARK AS bbRemark, F.QUANTITY_SAIRYOU AS discretionQuantity, F.CHOSE_REASON AS selectReason FROM BB_ACCEPT A LEFT JOIN SR_ACCEPT F ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = F.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = F.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM AND A.BB_BRANCH_CODE = F.BB_BRANCH_CODE AND TO_NUMBER(A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(F.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) WHERE A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}) AND A.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})
